title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. polybracteum
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. polybracteum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) commonly known as Hawkweed or Hieracium. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. polybracteum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
